title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at CMA CGM India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at CMA CGM India
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Logistics Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!
